full_text:
Single Cell LATAM Symposium: Connecting Communities and Advancing Research - 16-17 August 2024 - Hilton Copacabana Hotel, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
Roles
Chair Introduces the speaker/presenter; presents and moderates the session
Speaker aka key-note speaker: presents groundbreaking research or cutting-edge information of the field 
Presenter abstract presenter; short talk; selected from abstracts
Facilitator coordinates the workshop session; proposes and moderates discussions
